data.title: Long-Term Decline In Cereal Market Poses Structural Challenges For Kellogg, Analyst Says
data.description: J.P. Morgan analyst Ken Goldman rated WK Kellogg (NYSE:KLG) Neutral with a $19 price target after Q1 EPS of $0.20 missed estimates. Revenue fell short at $663M vs. $679.49M forecast. KLG cut its 2025 outlook, projecting a 2–3% drop in organic net sales and flat to lower EBITDA. Ongoing cereal category struggles, rising capex, and tariff risks justify a valuation discount, the analyst noted.

data.title: Netflix Keeps Hitting New Highs: Can TikTok-Style Feed, OpenAI Search Power Even More Growth?
data.description: Netflix is using OpenAI to better recommend selections for users while a new TikTok-style video feed will play clips of hit shows and movies to boost engagement.
